data.value: Manage cities and their associated countries

data.value: Enter the payment method information below

data.value: View and manage all payment methods

data.value: Manage shipping types and their factors

data.value: Enter the shipping type information below

data.name: List_Description_ShippingType
data.value: View and manage all shipping types

data.name: Page_Subtitle_Shipment
data.value: Manage all shipments and their details

data.value: Manage subscription packages and their limits

data.value: Hand-crafted & made with

data.value: I agree to all Terms & Conditions

data.value: What do you need to do today?

data.name: Txt_FreeSupport
data.value: Free 24/7 customer support, updates, and more with this template!

data.name: Txt_ReminderEvent
data.value: Just a reminder that you have an event today

data.name: Project_SchoolWebsite_Description
data.value: It is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content of a page.

data.name: Todo_ResolveLowPriorityTickets
data.value: Resolve all the low priority tickets due today

data.name: Val_StringLength
data.value: The {0} must be between {2} and {1} characters

data.name: Val_PositiveNumber
data.value: The {0} must be a positive number

data.name: Val_Language_Ar
data.value: Please Enter This Field In Arabic

data.name: Val_Language_En
data.value: Please Enter This Field In English Letter Only

data.name: Val_InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

data.name: Msg_Error
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request

data.name: Msg_Error_General
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again later

data.name: Msg_Error_NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found

data.name: Msg_Error_Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action

data.name: Msg_Error_Forbidden
data.value: Access to this resource is forbidden

data.name: Msg_Error_BadRequest
data.value: Invalid request. Please check your input

data.name: Msg_Error_Server
data.value: Server error. Please try again later

data.name: Msg_Error_Timeout
data.value: The request timed out. Please try again

data.name: Msg_Error_Validation
data.value: Validation failed. Please check your input

data.name: Msg_Error_Duplicate
data.value: A record with the same {0} already exists

data.name: Msg_Error_AccountLocked
data.value: Your account has been locked. Please contact support

data.name: Msg_Error_AccountDisabled
data.value: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support

data.name: Msg_Error_AccountNotVerified
data.value: Your account has not been verified. Please check your email

data.name: Msg_Error_EmailNotVerified
data.value: Your email has not been verified. Please check your inbox

data.name: Msg_Error_PhoneNotVerified
data.value: Your phone number has not been verified

data.name: Msg_Error_MaxAttempts
data.value: You have exceeded the maximum number of attempts

data.name: Msg_Error_SessionExpired
data.value: Your session has expired. Please log in again

data.name: Msg_Error_TokenExpired
data.value: This link has expired. Please request a new one

data.name: Msg_Error_TokenInvalid
data.value: Invalid token. Please request a new one

data.name: Msg_Error_FileSize
data.value: File size exceeds the maximum allowed

data.name: Msg_Error_Upload
data.value: Failed to upload file. Please try again

data.name: Msg_Error_Download
data.value: Failed to download file. Please try again

data.name: Msg_Error_Import
data.value: Failed to import data. Please check the file format

data.name: Msg_Error_Export
data.value: Failed to export data. Please try again

data.name: Msg_Error_Delete
data.value: Failed to delete. The record may be in use

data.name: Msg_Error_Save
data.value: Failed to save data. Please try again

data.name: Msg_Error_Update
data.value: Failed to update data. Please try again

data.name: Msg_Error_Connection
data.value: Connection error. Please check your internet connection

data.name: Msg_Error_Database
data.value: Database error. Please try again later

data.name: Msg_Error_Network
data.value: Network error. Please check your connection

data.name: Msg_Error_Permission
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action

data.value: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this {0}?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected items?

data.name: Msg_Warning_Permanent
data.value: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?

data.value: Are you sure you want to log out?

data.value: Are you sure you want to exit?

data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel?

data.value: Are you sure you want to reset?

data.value: This will overwrite existing data. Continue?

data.value: A similar record already exists. Continue?

data.name: Msg_Warning_Expiring
data.value: Warning: This item is expiring soon

data.value: The system will be under maintenance on {0}

data.value: Drag and drop files here or click to upload

data.value: Signing up is easy. It only takes a few steps
